subject: [PATCH 6/8] mm: use zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The patch introduces a zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy() to simplify the locking mechanism, replacing explicit lock/unlock patterns with automatic scope-based cleanup.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the locking mechanism in put_page_back_buddy() by introducing a zone lock guard, replacing the explicit lock/unlock pattern with automatic scope-based cleanup.

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: No review comments or feedback from other developers yet.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the page allocation code in the Linux kernel by introducing a zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy(). The current explicit lock/unlock pattern is replaced with automatic scope-based cleanup, reducing the risk of double-put bugs.
